Title: Bosch
Actors: Titus Welliver, Jamie Hector, Amy Aquino
Plot: Harry Bosch is an irreverent homicide detective in Los Angeles. Like any good protagonist he has problems with authority, follows his gut and bends a few rules while achieving the best solved case rate in all of California. Whatever situations the writers put him into he will undoubtedly be entertaining as he pursues justice.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 9 wins & 14 nominations total
